privileged_info_summary: The task uses completely synthetic data created in setup_task.sh. It contains 10 rides (from 2024-01-05 to 2024-02-05) with distances of 45, 32, 50, 28, 35, 48, 30, 42, 38, and 37 km, totaling exactly 385 km. Four maintenance components require tracking with service intervals: Chain (500 km), Tires (3000 km), Brake Pads (2000 km), and Full Tune-up (5000 km). After 385 km of riding, the remaining distances until service are: Chain 115 km, Tires 2615 km, Brake Pads 1615 km, and Full Tune-up 4615 km. The solver must create formulas in cells H2 (total mileage using SUM), H5-H8 (referencing service intervals from E column), and I5-I8 (calculating remaining distance using subtraction with absolute reference to H2).
